title: Missing text Essential Evangelion Chronicle Side A
display_title: Missing text Essential Evangelion Chronicle Side A
wikitext:
[]: Missing text - Essential Evangelion Chronicle: Side A             Quote Post by Neil-T » Wed Mar 23, 2016 5:26 am On the topic of the missing text in the English version of Essential Evangelion Chronicle: Side A (bottom left of page 15), has anyone already nailed down the exact wording? I strongly believe the interrupted sentence would read: Though she is generally quiet and rarely expresses emotions, Rei does smile freely in Gendoh's presence.

[]: Re: Missing text - Essential Evangelion Chronicle: Side A             Quote Post by Literary Eagle » Thu Mar 24, 2016 10:49 pm Oh, nice job! I'd say you've probably nailed it, or at the very least gotten really, really close. If I ever read the English version again (I tend to favor the French version since it doesn't have all those mistakes), in my head I'll probably read that sentence the way you've rendered it here. Good detective work!

[]: Re: Missing text - Essential Evangelion Chronicle: Side A             Quote Post by Neil-T » Fri Mar 25, 2016 5:58 am Thanks for the reply, Literary Eagle , and for the warm welcome to a newbie. (Are you bilingual, by the way? That's a handy advantage to have!) So, yeah, hopefully it at least offers readers something plausible to fill in the blanks.

[]: Re: Missing text - Essential Evangelion Chronicle: Side A             Quote Post by Literary Eagle » Fri Mar 25, 2016 11:19 pm Knowing other languages is indeed a handy skill to have! I can read English, French, and some Japanese (still need a dictionary for a lot of kanji), and it's been very useful for all these book reviews I've been doing, and for other stuff as well. Thanks again for sharing your nice bit of detective work for the English edition of Side A ! I actually sent UDON Entertainment an email about the missing text and the other errors last year, but I didn't receive a reply, so I'm glad that someone was at least able to figure out what the English version of that sentence most likely says. Yay!

[]: Re: Missing text - Essential Evangelion Chronicle: Side A             Quote Post by Neil-T » Sat Mar 26, 2016 6:14 am Wow, I'm jealous, Literary Eagle . I mean, Chronicle's been out in French for ages! I know some Japanese but nowhere near enough to get by without subtitles. I can read hiragana and katakana but very few kanji, I'm afraid. Those are some impressive skills you have! Re: no reply from UDON, that's a shame. I'd hoped they would put the corrections and missing text on their website, or at least acknowledge the problem. I can't claim to know how their books are put together, but you'd think the text files must still exist somewhere. I've been curious, by the way: how come the text is missing in the English version but the French is okay? Is it just that the English text takes up more lines and comes too far down the page?

[]: Re: Missing text - Essential Evangelion Chronicle: Side A             Quote Post by Literary Eagle » Sat Mar 26, 2016 2:52 pm Neil-T wrote: I've been curious, by the way: how come the text is missing in the English version but the French is okay? Is it just that the English text takes up more lines and comes too far down the page?

[]: Re: Missing text - Essential Evangelion Chronicle: Side A             Quote Post by Neil-T » Mon Mar 28, 2016 4:46 am That's a fascinating insight. I had no idea just how different the two layouts were. Yeah, you're right: that's a couple of needless things that have combined to cause that mistake. I think, as an anime fan, you kind of get used to seeing translation blunders and stuff, but text buried under a picture is right there on the page. It's not like you'd need to have in-depth knowledge of Eva to spot it as a proof-reader. I don't understand how that mistake slipped through the net. Seriously, though, ' Murdoch ' Institute in Side B?! Nightmare!

[]: Missing Text guessing game             Quote Post by Neil-T » Tue Apr 19, 2016 7:50 am Anyone fancy a go at the Missing Text guessing game ?

[]: Re: Missing text - Essential Evangelion Chronicle: Side A             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Tue Apr 26, 2016 1:55 pm Thank you for putting this mystery to rest!

[]: Re: Missing text - Essential Evangelion Chronicle: Side A             Quote Post by Neil-T » Wed Apr 27, 2016 4:19 am No worries, Tumbling Down . Glad if it helps.
